# muvon/octobrain

Installs the octobrain CLI (code indexing and search tool by Muvon)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `octobrain` | Run octobrain |
| `octobrain --help` | Show help and available options |
| `octobrain --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
octobrain --version

# Show help
octobrain --help
```
